TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Michael Adams tatama, nalecuhan i 19 bulad 1 a demiad, 1963 a mihcaan, Michael Adams, miunduay. Michael Adams unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Michael Adams i 1985 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 66, namapili' tu nu Sacramento Kings putiput.
S.PHON: mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ** bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams, miunduaj. mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj. mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu sa ¶ram…ônto ki≈ãs putiput.
S.FORM: Michael Adams tatama, nalecuhan i 19 bulad 1 a demiad, 1963 a mihcaan, Michael Adams, miunduay. Michael Adams unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzay mimaliay. Michael Adams i 1985 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 66, namapili' tu nu Sacramento Kings putiput.
S.PHON: mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams tatama, nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i ** bur~…æad * a d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶aan, mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams, miunduaj. mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u misimaw zikuzaj mimar~…æiaj. mi ¶ƒßa…ôr~…æ adams i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu sa ¶ram…ônto ki≈ãs putiput.
